title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — app.kubernetes.io/name
text:
Type: Label
Example:
app.kubernetes.io/name: "mysql"
Used on: All Objects (typically used on
workload resources
).
The name of the application.
One of the
recommended labels
.

Type: Label
Example:
app.kubernetes.io/part-of: "wordpress"
Used on: All Objects (typically used on
workload resources
).
The name of a higher-level application this object is part of.
One of the
recommended labels
.
